mapper.select: SELECT r.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm, mem.member_nm AS member_nm, cd_rs.code_label AS review_status_cd_nm FROM pd_review r LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = r.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = r.prod_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = r.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rs ON cd_rs.code_grp = 'REVIEW_STATUS' AND cd_rs.code_value = r.review_status_cd WHERE r.review_id = #{id}
